originalTitle: Corsair’s PC case with a panoramic glass design is $70 off
summary: On the hunt for a PC case that’s loaded with features and has a unique look? Amazon, Best Buy, and Corsair are selling the Corsair Frame 4500X RS for $119.99, a $70 discount from the usual price. The versatile case supports motherboards up to EATX, GPUs up to 460mm in length, and has a seamless […]
content: On the hunt for a PC case that’s loaded with features and has a unique look? Amazon, Best Buy, and Corsair are selling the Corsair Frame 4500X RS for $119.99, a $70 discount from the usual price. The versatile case supports motherboards up to EATX, GPUs up to 460mm in length, and has a seamless panoramic glass window that wraps around its front and left side. The case includes three fans with reverse rotors mounted to its right side, letting the ARGB lighting shine into the case while they pull in air. [Product: CORSAIR Frame 4500X RS | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FJ2PYLFB?tag=theverge02-20, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fcorsair-frame-4500x-rs-r-argb-panoramic-glass-mid-tower-pc-case-white%2FJ39TSCPKS9, https://go.corsair.com/c/482924/490888/8513?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.corsair.com%2Fus%2Fen%2Fp%2Fpc-cases%2Fcc-9011315-ww%2Fframe-4500x-rs-r-argb-panoramic-glass-mid-tower-pc-case-white-cc-9011315-ww] While the panoramic window might draw more attention, one of this case’s standout functional features is Corsair’s Infinirail system. Rather than having individual holes for fan screws, there are long slots on sliding rails, giving you more flexibility with cooling components and configuration. As a result, you can fit radiators up to 280mm or 360mm on the top or side of the case, depending on whether you opt for 120mm or 140mm case fans. The case also supports rear connection motherboards like this Gigabyte X870 Aorus for cleaner cable runs, and is ready for vertical GPU mounting if you buy a riser cable. There are some other nice inclusions as well, like an anti-sag GPU support arm, and the screws come in a reusable box rather than a series of tiny plastic bags. The case includes a two year manufacturer’s warranty.
chineseTitle: Corsair 的全景玻璃设计 PC 机箱立减 70 美元
chineseSummary: 正在寻找一款功能齐全且外观独特的电脑机箱吗？亚马逊、百思买和 Corsair 的 Corsair Frame 4500X RS 售价为 119.99 美元，比平常价格折扣 70 美元。这款多功能机箱支持高达 EATX 的主板、长达 460 毫米的 GPU，并具有无缝 [...]
chineseContent: 正在寻找一款功能齐全且外观独特的电脑机箱吗？亚马逊、百思买和 Corsair 的 Corsair Frame 4500X RS 售价为 119.99 美元，比平常价格折扣 70 美元。这款多功能机箱支持高达 EATX 的主板、长度高达 460 毫米的 GPU，并具有环绕其正面和左侧的无缝全景玻璃窗。该机箱包括三个风扇，其右侧安装有反向转子，让 ARGB 灯光在吸入空气时照射到机箱内。 [产品：美商海盗船框架 4500X RS | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FJ2PYLFB?tag=theverge02-20， https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fcorsair-frame-4500x-rs-r-argb-panoramic-glass-mid-tower-pc-case-white%2FJ39TSCPKS9， https://go.corsair.com/c/482924/490888/8513?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.corsair.com%2Fus%2Fen%2Fp%2Fpc-ca ses%2Fcc-9011315-ww%2Fframe-4500x-rs-r-argb-全景玻璃-中塔-pc-case-白色-cc-9011315-ww]虽然全景窗户可能会引起更多关注，但这款机箱的突出功能特点之一是 Corsair 的 Infinirail 系统。滑轨上没有单独的风扇螺钉孔，而是有长槽，为您提供了冷却组件和配置的更大灵活性。因此，您可以在机箱顶部或侧面安装最大 280 毫米或 360 毫米的散热器，具体取决于您选择 120 毫米还是 140 毫米机箱风扇。该机箱还支持后部连接主板，例如技嘉 X870 Aorus，以实现更干净的电缆布线，如果您购买转接电缆，则可以进行垂直 GPU 安装。还有一些其他不错的内含物，例如防下垂 GPU 支撑臂，螺钉装在可重复使用的盒子中，而不是一系列小塑料袋中。该保护壳提供两年制造商保修。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
